description_long: This doll features a whimsical, slightly eerie design with a round head, large red and white eyes, and a wide, toothy grin. It wears a striped blue and red shirt with two white buttons, matching red pants, and brown shoes. The doll's hands are exaggeratedly large with long, pointed fingers, and its head is topped with a red and blue striped beanie hat featuring a red propeller. The face is accented by a red clown nose and brown eyebrows, while the mouth is open, revealing a row of white teeth. The back of the head and body are smooth, with the striped pattern continuing around the torso and hat.
description: A colorful, striped doll with a propeller beanie, large hands, and a wide, toothy grin, dressed in red and blue with clown-like features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's wide grin, large red and white eyes, red nose, striped shirt, and propeller beanie.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the protruding nose, open mouth with visible teeth, and the depth of the hands and hat.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the striped hat and shirt, with the propeller and smooth, buttonless back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, nose, and the extended hand.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a playful, circus-inspired outfit featuring a short-sleeved, blue and red vertically striped shirt with two white buttons, bright red pants, and brown shoes. The ensemble is topped with a matching red and blue striped beanie hat with a red propeller, evoking a classic clown or carnival performer aesthetic.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its arms extended outward and slightly bent at the elbows, hands open and fingers splayed. The legs are straight and close together, while the head faces forward in a static, neutral stance.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a wide, fixed grin with visible teeth, large open eyes with red irises and white pupils, and raised brown eyebrows, giving it a perpetually cheerful and slightly mischievous expression.
attribute_hair_style: Short, brown hair peeks out from under the beanie, styled simply and close to the head.
